description_long: This is a single-story residential house set on a large rectangular plot of green lawn. The house features a broad, low-pitched gable roof in gray, with a central skylight or raised section. The front facade has a wide staircase leading up to a covered porch supported by columns, flanked by symmetrical windows. The rear of the house opens to a patio area with a rectangular swimming pool, and the property is bordered by hedges and a driveway leading to a side entrance. The windows are arranged in neat, horizontal rows, and the exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color. The overall design is modern and streamlined, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, single-story house with a gray gable roof, wide front porch, symmetrical windows, and a backyard pool on a large green lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide staircase, covered porch with columns, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long profile of the house, the backyard pool, and the driveway leading to a side entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, swimming pool, and the back entryway with a path and hedges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's length, pool, and the driveway with adjacent landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide staircase leading to a covered porch with columns and a central main door
